description_long: This is a modern L-shaped outdoor chaise constructed with a woven rattan or synthetic wicker frame in a dark gray color. The seating area is topped with thick, light beige cushions that cover both the seat and the backrest, providing comfort and a contemporary look. The chaise features a left-side extended lounge section, allowing for both sitting and reclining. The backrest is segmented into three distinct cushion sections, each matching the seat cushions in color and material. Both ends of the chaise have wide, boxy armrests that are integrated into the frame, giving the piece a sturdy and substantial appearance. The overall design is clean, geometric, and well-suited for urban patios, parks, or communal outdoor spaces.
description: A modern L-shaped outdoor chaise with a dark woven frame and thick light beige cushions, featuring a left-side lounge extension and boxy armrests. The design is clean and comfortable, ideal for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shape, left-side lounge extension, and three backrest cushions with both armrests visible.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the depth of the lounge extension and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the woven back panels and the segmentation between the two main seating sections.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, showing the shorter seat section and the right armrest, with the lounge extension receding.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest consists of three large, rectangular cushions that are evenly spaced and aligned, providing a segmented but continuous support. The backrest is straight, of medium height, and lacks any decorative tufting or buttons, emphasizing a minimalist, modern style.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, wide and boxy, integrated into the frame, and covered in the same woven material as the base.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are not distinctly visible, as the base extends to the ground in a box-like fashion, suggesting a concealed or integrated leg design typical of outdoor rattan furniture.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid light beige with a smooth, plain surface and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three loose backrest cushions and two large seat cushions, one for the main seat and one for the lounge extension, all arranged to fit snugly within the frame and provide full coverage.
